justifications.completeness: Extraction detects only 1 of 2 pedestrians and 2 of 4 vehicles from the ground truth, so a large portion of objects is missing.

justifications.completeness: Detected only 1 of 4 pedestrians and 2 of 5 vehicles (3 of 9 ground-truth objects), so coverage of scene entities is low.

justifications.completeness: The extraction detects only one pedestrian out of four and three vehicles out of six, missing multiple objects and several parked vehicles so overall coverage is poor.

justifications.completeness: Detected far fewer pedestrians and vehicles than annotated, covering only 2 of 5 persons and 2 of 5 vehicles.

justifications.completeness: Extraction reports only 3 of 6 pedestrians and 1 of 5 vehicles from the ground truth, missing multiple objects.

justifications.completeness: The extraction recovers 5 of 9 annotated objects (3/4 pedestrians, 2/5 vehicles) and omits several vehicles and one pedestrian while also failing to capture key motion states, so overall object and attribute coverage is incomplete.

justifications.completeness: Extraction captures only three pedestrians and a single vehicle versus six persons and four vehicles in the ground truth, missing several actors and many attributes.

justifications.completeness: Detected 3 pedestrians and 1 vehicle while ground truth has 4 pedestrians and 3 vehicles, missing several objects and motion labels.
